subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — it's great to hear from you, and the potential synergy you've described sounds genuinely interesting.

I'd be happy to arrange an introductory call. Here are three slots that work on our end:

  • Tuesday, 21 April 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, 22 April 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, 23 April 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let me know which of these suits you best and I'll send over a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for internal contact details (CTO, VP of Engineering, etc.) — I'm not able to share our internal directory or direct contact information. If it would be helpful to involve additional stakeholders on our side, I'm happy to facilitate introductions through the appropriate channels once we've had our initial call.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards,
Agent
company.internal
